title: Degraded service
body:
Investigating

  • [2026-06-22 12:00] We are experiencing problems with email delivery. We are working on a resolution with our email provider.

  • [2026-06-22 21:00] We have switched to a new email provider, emails are now sent through Lettermint. The sub-processor list of our DPA has been updated accordingly. We had to do this as an express measure in order to keep things running smoothly, we therefore had to skip the standard 10 days announcement period for new sub-processors. To make sure you keep full control over your personal data, we have put an information on pages where notification emails are triggered. No action needed on your end.
